# BP-73 negative: local map is initialized before the write
lang: go
file: BP-73-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

func collect() map[string]int {
	counts := make(map[string]int)
	counts["ok"] = 1
	return counts
}

func update(existing map[string]int) {
	existing["ok"] = 1
}

func initializeLater() map[string]int {
	var counts map[string]int
	counts = make(map[string]int)
	counts["ok"] = 1
	return counts
}
